name: Fajita Chicken Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 Ounces pasta, fresh, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chicken fajita strips, cooked pasta, diced zucchini, yellow squash, red bell pepper, and green onion.
2. Drizzle with Italian salad dressing (2 1/2 tablespoons) and mayonnaise (1 1/4 tablespoons).
3. Gently toss all ingredients together until evenly coated.
4. Separate the head of romaine lettuce into leaves and finely chop the parsley.
5. Add the chopped parsley to the bowl and gently toss with some Italian dressing reserved for tossing with the romaine.
6. Serve on a bed of romaine lettuce leaves.
